name: Mexican Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1/2 jar thick and chunky picante sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 225 grams of cream cheese, softened, with the picante sauce and chopped dried beef until creamy. If desired, chop the dried beef in a food processor before adding it to the other ingredients.
2. Place one tortilla shell on a serving dish and spread with an even layer of the mixture. Repeat this process until you have stacked 8-10 tortilla shells with layers of cream cheese between each.
3. Cover the stack with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
4. Cut into wedges to serve. Sprinkle grated cheese and paprika on top. Optionally, serve with sour cream, guacamole, or extra picante sauce on the side.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
